tasks.title: Bump tenant governance SDK and wire governance UI
tasks.description: Use the drts-fleet-platform tenant governance client surface for TN_CostCenter, TN_Rules, and TN_NewBooking. Do not invent local governance schemas or keep Supabase as business authority for these flows.
acceptance: TN_CostCenter uses the shared client for cost-center list/detail/create-update/disable and coverage readout.
TN_Rules uses the shared client for approval-rule list/detail/create-update/disable/reorder/evaluate and quota-aware rule displays.
TN_NewBooking uses shared client flows for cost-center selection, quota preview, approval-required state, and approval request status.
Handle BOOKING_COST_CENTER_UNKNOWN, BOOKING_COST_CENTER_INVALID, BOOKING_COST_CENTER_DISABLED, QUOTA_INSUFFICIENT_AT_COMMIT, APPROVAL_NOT_AUTHORIZED, and APPROVAL_NO_RESOLVABLE_APPROVERS.
All mutating calls still send Authorization, X-Request-Id, and Idempotency-Key where required by the existing closed-loop protocol.
API_GAP_REQUESTS.json should remain empty unless a concrete missing method, field, endpoint, or error envelope is found against contract version 373225b746ab15b72b7c5b954b24b89b4b8ce23f.
